name: Almond White Chocolate Bark
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread almonds in a single layer in a shallow pan.
2. Place the pan in a cold oven and preheat to 350°F (175°C).
3. Toast the almonds for 12 to 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lightly toasted. Allow them to cool completely.
4. Melt the white chocolate over low heat in a double boiler.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the toasted almonds and apricots.
6. Drop heaping tablespoons of the mixture onto waxed paper.
7. Refrigerate until cool and hardened.
8. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Keeps up to 2 weeks. Makes 12 large pieces...or 24 small ones.
